metadata.description: Extract design tokens from Figma in W3C DTCG or CTI format. Generates JSON, CSS, SCSS, and Style Dictionary config. Write tokens back to Figma via REST API.

plugins.name: design-tokens
plugins.description: Extract design tokens from Figma design system files and write them back. Supports W3C DTCG and CTI naming conventions, 3-layer token architecture (Primitive, Semantic, Component), multi-theme modes, and bidirectional sync via Figma REST API.
